query:
UPDATE videos SET status='failed', progress_step='Pipeline killed — switching to stock-image only mode', progress_percent=0 WHERE id=72 AND status='generating';
SELECT id, status, progress_step, progress_percent FROM videos WHERE status='generating' OR id=72 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
